summary: Malicious package from the event-stream supply-chain attack (2018); exfiltrated cryptocurrency wallet credentials. Published solely as malware.
event-stream 3.3.6 added a dependency on the malicious flatmap-stream package (2018).
ua-parser-js compromised releases (Oct 2021); shipped a cryptominer and password stealer.
node-ipc malicious/protestware releases (Mar 2022); destructive payload triggered by geolocation.
Typosquat of colorama published as malware on PyPI; clipboard cryptocurrency-address hijacker.
Typosquat of python-dateutil published as malware on PyPI (2019).
Typosquat of jellyfish (capital-I homoglyph) published as malware on PyPI (2019); stole SSH/GPG keys.
Typosquat of rust_decimal published as malware on crates.io (May 2022); injected a payload that fetched and executed a GitLab CI credential stealer. Published solely as malware.
rest-client RubyGems account hijack (Aug 2019); malicious release 1.6.13 exfiltrated environment/credentials and pulled remote code via a backdoor.
strong_password RubyGems account takeover (Jun 2019); malicious release 0.0.7 fetched and eval'd remote code (Pastebin) for a backdoor.
bootstrap-sass RubyGems hijack (Mar 2019); malicious release 3.2.0.3 contained a remote-code-execution backdoor triggered via a crafted cookie.
